features: Fast, effective relief from diarrhoea within 1 hour
Can relieve diarrhoea quickly in just 1 dose
Helps restore your bowel to its natural rhythm and helps your body retain water and vital nutrients
Don't let diarrhoea hold you back, treat it with imodium
IMODIUM Original Capsules contain loperamide for acute diarrhoea (aged 12+) and for medically diagnosed IBS diarrhoea (aged 18+), always read the label
description: Product Description IMODIUM Originals can relieve diarrhoea quickly & effectively in 1 dose & just 1 hour. Diarrhoea can have various triggers, including certain foods/drinks, eating habits, stress, menstruation, & changes in diet while travelling. When suffering from diarrhoea, you can tend to feel weak & lacking in energy due to loss of associated fluids & salts. Each IMODIUM Original capsule contains an active ingredient called Loperamide, which gently slows down your digestion to its natural rhythm to help your body retain water + vital nutrients. For effective relief from diarrhoea in 1 dose, take IMODIUM® Originals! Ingredients Each Capsule contains 2 mg Loperamide Hydrochloride, Also contains Lactose Directions Dosage: For oral use only. Sudden short-lived (acute) diarrhoea: Adults and children over 12 years: Swallow 2 capsules initially, followed if required, by 1 capsule after every further loose bowel movement, up to a maximum of 6 capsules per day. If your diarrhoea lasts for more than 24 hours, consult your doctor. Diarrhoea associated with Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) already diagnosed by a doctor: Adults aged 18 years and over: Swallow 2 capsules initially, followed if required, by 1 capsule after every further loose bowel movement, or as advised previously by your doctor. Do not take more than 6 capsules per day. If your symptoms change or if your diarrhoea persists for more than 2 weeks, consult your doctor. Not recommended for children under 12 years. Imodium is for the symptomatic relief of diarrhoea only and is not a substitute for rehydration therapy. Please read the enclosed leaflet carefully before use. Warning: Do not exceed the stated dose. Safety Warning Keep all medicines out of reach and sight of children. Min Age Limit (Advisory): 12 Years Manufacturer Contact Information Product licence holder: McNeil Products Ltd, Maidenhead, Berkshire, SL6 3UG, UK. See more
